title: Age Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:Aging_scene_last_crusade.gif|thumb|center|600x600px|Walter Donovan ages to death after choosing the wrong grail (Indiana Jones)]]

==Summary==
'''Age Manipulation''' is the ability to control the age of one's self, other organisms, and/or objects. This can be used in a variety of ways, such as returning a target to a much younger state, rendering them a helpless child, or to rapidly age others, to old age and potentially even their death. In some cases, this effect is so powerful that it can reduce a user's surroundings to dust.

==Users==
* [[Voporak]] ([[Bionicle]])
* [[Baraggan Louisenbairn]] ([[Bleach]])
* [[Grandfather]] (Codename: KND)
* [[The Shrike]] ([[Hyperion Cantos]])
* [[Alessi]] and [[Prosciutto]] ([[JoJo's Bizarre Adventure]])
* [[Nasus]] ([[League of Legends]])
* [[Sakuya Izayoi]] ([[Touhou Project]])
